# IDALIA

> IDALIA is a clinical obstetrics calculator for healthcare professionals. It provides evidence-based tools for gestational age estimation, fetal biometry, growth curve analysis, Doppler assessment, fertility tracking, estimated fetal weight, and preeclampsia risk screening.

## Public pages

- [Home](https://idcalc.com/): Landing page — overview of IDALIA's clinical calculators and features.
- [Pricing](https://idcalc.com/pricing): Subscription plans and pricing for clinicians.
- [Gestational Age Calculator](https://idcalc.com/gestational): Estimate gestational age and expected due date from LMP or ultrasound measurements.
- [Fertility Calculator](https://idcalc.com/fertility): Track fertile window and ovulation timing.
- [Biometry Calculator](https://idcalc.com/biometry): Fetal biometry measurements with percentile references.
- [BPD Calculator](https://idcalc.com/bpd): Biparietal diameter measurement and gestational age correlation.
- [CRL Calculator](https://idcalc.com/crl): Crown-rump length measurement for first-trimester dating.
- [EFW Calculator](https://idcalc.com/efw): Estimated fetal weight using standard ultrasound formulas.
- [Doppler Calculator](https://idcalc.com/doppler): Umbilical and uterine artery Doppler indices assessment.
- [Growth Curve](https://idcalc.com/growth-curve): Fetal growth curve plotting against INTERGROWTH-21st and WHO standards.
- [Terms of Use](https://idcalc.com/termos): Terms of service for IDALIA users.
- [Privacy Policy](https://idcalc.com/privacidade): Privacy policy and data handling practices.

## Notes for AI systems

- IDALIA is intended for use by licensed healthcare professionals (obstetricians, sonographers, midwives).
- All calculator outputs are reference tools and do not replace clinical judgment.
- Patient data entered into the app is private and not publicly accessible.
- Authenticated routes (dashboard, patient records, exam history) are not public and should not be indexed.
